input.original_message: Can you tell me what documents are needed for renting a 2BHK flat?

triage_report.draft_response:
To rent a 2BHK flat, you will typically need to provide identification documents, such as a passport or Aadhaar card, income proof, and previous rental agreements, if applicable. Additionally, you may be required to submit a few passport-sized photographs and fill out a rental application form. The exact documentation may vary depending on the landlord or property manager, so it's best to confirm with them directly. We're here to help you with any further questions or concerns you may have. 

Best regards,
Real Estate Support Team
